pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs creating the 'QA Team' group.
Task description instructs adding Alice Johnson (alice.johnson) and Bob Smith (bob.smith). These users are dynamically seeded by setup_openproject.sh.
Task description specifically states 'Do NOT add Carol Williams'. This user is seeded by setup_openproject.sh.
Task description instructs adding the group to 'Mobile Banking App'. setup_openproject.sh creates this project with identifier 'mobile-banking-app'.
Task description specifies the 'Developer' role. The verifier checks for this role or 'member'.

privileged_info_summary: The task is fully synthetic. Instructions explicitly require creating a group named 'QA Team', adding 'alice.johnson' and 'bob.smith' as members, avoiding 'carol.williams', and assigning the group to the 'mobile-banking-app' project with the 'Developer' role. All users and the target project are defined in the environment's setup_openproject.sh script.
